title: ED17 — Experimental GWAVE sound #17 (spinner-ish)
tldr: Third 'ED' experimental preset. The catalogue notes a 'spinner' character — possibly an alternate take on `SPNRV` (spinner drip) that didn't ship as the canonical version.
how: GWAVE preset designed in the same vein as `SPNRV` — short, percussive, no pattern walking — but with different period / echo / wavetable choices. Useful for A/B against SPNRV to hear the parameter-space neighbourhood.
watch: Standard GWAVE indicators — compare against SPNRV in A/B.
